html:
Exclusive to:

“The wearer will dig up turf they are standing on and place turf when it is loaded with turf items.”

-

The Turf-Raiser Helm is a piece of clothing exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It was added in A Little Drama update. It is a head slot item that can be crafted with a Rare Blueprint that drops after killing an Antlion or giving her a Beach Toy Trinket (drops the Lazy Deserter as well as the Turf-Raiser Helm Blueprint). The trinket can be found inside of Crumpled Packages which are fished from the Oasis during Summer.

When equipped, the helmet automatically digs up turfs the survivor wearing the helm moves over. The helmet also comes with a slot that accepts turf. When turf is placed in this slot, the helm will place that turf item when a survivor moves over bare ground. The helmet spends 1% durability for every 4 tiles of turf dug or laid, allowing the helm to alter 400 cells in total.

Skins

Swamp Collection
Mangrove Helm
Any turf from sod to swamp is swapped with a simple step.

"antlionhat"
“It's a groundbreaking scientific achievement.”
–Wilson
“Pfft, what a dumb-looking hat. I love it.”
–Willow
“The ground will flee before mighty Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“A crown fit for a queen of dirt.”
–Wendy
“THE GROUND WILL TREMBLE BEFORE ME”
–WX-78
“It's quite convenient for landscaping.”
–Wickerbottom
“It sure beats using a pitchfork, eh?”
–Woodie
“If the ground displeases me, I'll pull it up by the roots.”
–Maxwell
“A helm tö change the very gröund I walk upön!”
–Wigfrid
“We can pretend we're an Antlion!”
–Webber
“Madame Antlion was kind enough to share the recipe.”
–Warly
“Funny hat moves ground?”
–Wormwood
“It sure makes landscaping a breeze!”
–Winona
“I'd be lion if I said I wasn't antsy to try it, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Get rid of dumb grass and stuff, make room for more swamp!”
–Wurt
“I've always wanted to look like bug royalty!”
–Walter
“Oh my, what a splendidly strange hat!”
–Wanda
“The wearer will dig up turf they are standing on and place turf when it is loaded with turf items.”
-
The Turf-Raiser Helm is a piece of clothing exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It was added in A Little Drama update. It is a head slot item that can be crafted with a Rare Blueprint that drops after killing an Antlion or giving her a Beach Toy Trinket (drops the Lazy Deserter as well as the Turf-Raiser Helm Blueprint). The trinket can be found inside of Crumpled Packages which are fished from the Oasis during Summer.
When equipped, the helmet automatically digs up turfs the survivor wearing the helm moves over. The helmet also comes with a slot that accepts turf. When turf is placed in this slot, the helm will place that turf item when a survivor moves over bare ground. The helmet spends 1% durability for every 4 tiles of turf dug or laid, allowing the helm to alter 400 cells in total.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Turf-Raiser là một trang phục dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together. Nó đã được thêm vào trong bản cập nhật A Little Drama. Nó là một vật phẩm ở khe đầu có thể được chế tạo bằng Bản thiết kế hiếm rơi ra sau khi giết Kiến Sư tử hoặc đưa cho nó Đồ chơi đồ chơi trên bãi biển (rơi ra Bản thiết kế Lazy Deserter cũng như Bản thiết kế mũ bảo hiểm Turf-Raiser). Vật trang sức này có thể được tìm thấy bên trong các Gói Nhàu Nát được đánh bắt từ Ốc đảo vào Mùa hè.
